Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: The Studium app is an essential companion app for all Studium Members.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters craft progress:
- Adds Craft progress title and total craft time display after Artisan starts.
- Logs completed craft-time records locally for future dashboard work.
- Widens material pills, keeps pill text white, and darkens the donut track.
Punchline: An essential companion app for all Studium members.
